metadata.title: Another Barbershop | Premium Barbershop in București
metadata.description: Another Barbershop in București - Not about hype, just doing things right. Expert haircuts, beard trims, and grooming services by skilled barbers with 6+ years experience.
metadata.ogImageAlt: Another Barbershop - Premium Barbershop in București

about.label: About
about.title: We don't promise. We deliver.
about.description: Another Barbershop isn't about hype or passing trends. It's about doing things right, every single time. Come for the cut, stay for the experience.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we offer
services.description: Simple services, flawlessly executed. No compromises.

classic-haircut.name: The Classic
classic-haircut.description: Consultation, cut, and styling. The full experience.

beard-trim.name: Beard Work
beard-trim.description: Shaping, lining, and conditioning. Sharp and clean.

full-service.name: The Works
full-service.description: Haircut and beard trim together. Our most popular choice.

buzz-cut.name: Clean Buzz
buzz-cut.description: Precise clipper work. Simple. Done right.

kids-cut.name: Junior Cut
kids-cut.description: For the young gentlemen. Ages 12 and under.

hot-towel-shave.name: Hot Towel Shave
hot-towel-shave.description: Traditional straight razor. A proper experience.

team.label: Team
team.title: Who we are
team.description: Experienced barbers, passionate about their craft.

quotes.alexandru: Clean lines and honest conversation. That's the formula.
quotes.mihai: Every client deserves to walk out feeling ready for anything.
quotes.andrei: Good music, steady hands, no rush. That's how we work here.
quotes.radu: Details matter. The lineup, the blend, the finish. It all counts.

footer.description: The kind of place you come back to.
